## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows architecture boundary (`UI -> repository -> datasource`)
- [ ] Handles loading/empty/error/success states
- [ ] Accessibility basics verified
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run verify:migrations` passes (if DB touched)
- [ ] Supabase migration added for every schema/function change (no dashboard-only drift)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior/contracts changed)
